## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Monograph and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, Reddit posting, and knowledge management systems.](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is developing Reddit post formats for Monograph, focusing on pithy, declarative language with minimal linking](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [EXA research pipeline ingests various sources (including Monograph's customer stories) to generate content efficiently](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=14.0)
  - [Monograph is exploring advanced knowledge management solutions for better content synthesis and querying capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=670.0)

## Topics

### Reddit Content Strategy

  - [Developing three post formats: utilization rate, time tracking, and architect salary](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=76.0)
  - [Posts use declarative language, minimal linking, and aim for engagement](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=94.0)
  - [Experimenting with "we" vs. factual statements for Monograph's voice](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=396.0)
  - [Designing metrics to measure LLM visibility impact and traffic from Reddit posts](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)

### Content Generation Pipeline

  - [EXA researcher creates comprehensive research plans based on topics and personas](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=750.0)
  - [Pipeline ingests various sources, including Monograph's customer stories](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=795.0)
  - [Knowledge base built from past research and one-time ingestions](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=958.0)
  - [Evaluation process ensures adherence to guidelines and rules](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=823.0)

### Knowledge Management Challenges

  - [Chris exploring solutions for managing large context and diverse content sources](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=1703.0)
  - [Interest in developing a system allowing efficient loading of content "packets"](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=1788.0)
  - [Desire for ability to adapt source context and push to queryable system of record](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=2020.0)
  - [Need for both raw data storage and meaning synthesis capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=2033.0)

### EXA Research Tool

  - [Matthew recommends exploring EXA for Chris's use case](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=1875.0)
  - [EXA outperforms Perplexity in detail-orientation and depth of information retrieval](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=1891.0)
  - [Potential for quick front-end development using EXA API for local database queries](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=1975.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to update customer stories in their knowledge base, removing churned customers](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Matthew to inquire about best practices for storing and querying content internally](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=1844.0)
  - [Chris to investigate EXA as a potential solution for Monograph's knowledge management needs](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=1991.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue refining Reddit post formats and prepare for publication](https://fathom.video/share/7iN3Ncxv7G9XceM8Ds2Pmp3NXPtbRV89?tab=summary&timestamp=293.0)
